assessments.status_rationale: Today’s bullets focus on U.S.-Iran military operations and oil prices, but provide no evidence that OFAC issued a General License/FAQ explicitly authorizing U.S. persons to purchase/finance/insure/transport Iranian-origin crude oil for market-stabilization purposes.

No ECB monetary-policy statement/account/press-conference language is included in today’s bullets, so there is no basis to confirm or falsify the phrasing about higher energy prices being an upside risk to inflation.
No U.S. Census Bureau New Home Sales (SAAR) release or figure is referenced in today’s bullets, so the threshold condition (≤ 550,000) cannot be assessed.

CNBC/MarketWatch report a Super Micro co-founder was indicted on Nvidia smuggling charges, which could match the predicted DOJ additional criminal case involving illegal export/diversion of advanced AI GPUs to China. However, the bullets do not clearly state (a) DOJ announced the case, (b) the destination was China, or (c) the conduct involved smuggling/shell companies/false end-users as specified.

Today’s items mention OpenAI ads testing and agentic shopping, but not a generally available desktop 'super app' update with integrated in-app web browsing and a built-in coding workspace announced via OpenAI release notes/blog.
No SEC Form D (or comparable filing) linked to Jeff Bezos/affiliates for an AI-focused fund, nor reporting of a ≥$5B first close, appears in today’s bullets.
No announcement is listed regarding Fervo (or a Fervo-led consortium) signing a ≥200 MW geothermal PPA/capacity contract for a single multi-year offtake.

Although there is significant Hormuz-related news (e.g., U.S. attacks to clear the Strait), none of the bullets indicate Reuters/Bloomberg/FT reporting that marine war-risk premiums for transiting Hormuz rose by ≥50% versus the February 2026 average.

The news highlights a co-founder’s indictment and stock drop, but does not clearly state that SMCI disclosed in an SEC filing that it received a subpoena/search warrant/formal notice of investigation relating to export controls/sanctions compliance involving AI GPUs/servers.
